review_title: Boosting Efficiency and Engagement with Rasayel
description: Rasayel is helping us streamline our workflows and improve team performance by automating lead qualification and campaign management. This has significantly reduced our manual workload, allowing our team to focus on higher-value tasks. The insights from their reporting tools have also enabled us to make data-driven decisions, leading to increased efficiency and better engagement with our clients. Overall, Rasayel has been a key factor in enhancing our operational efficiency and driving business growth. We highly recommend Rasayel to any organization looking to enhance their operational capabilities and drive business success.
author: Daniel A.
pros: Rasayel has significantly shortened our sales cycle, saved us valuable time, and boosted engagement with our clients. Their innovative solutions and dedicated team have made a tangible difference in our business efficiency and growth.
cons: While Rasayel offers excellent features and support, some tools could benefit from enhancements to fully unlock their potential. Additionally, some advanced features could use more detailed documentation to help users make the most of them.

review_title: operation review
description: The CRM supports integration with various third-party applications, such as email platforms, accounting software, and e-commerce systems. This interoperability ensures that businesses can seamlessly incorporate RASAYL CRM into their existing workflows.
author: Abd Elrahman A.
pros: RASAYL CRM is a comprehensive solution designed to enhance customer relationship management through automation, integration, and detailed analytics. It offers significant benefits in terms of efficiency, customer relationship building, and data-driven decision-making. However, businesses should consider the potential learning curve, customization needs, and cost when evaluating this CRM for their operations. Overall, RASAYL CRM stands out as a valuable tool for businesses looking to optimize their sales and customer service processes.
cons: By centralizing customer information and interactions, RASAYL CRM helps businesses build stronger, more personalized relationships with their clients.

review_title: Rasayel review
author: Herbert E.
pros: I like the templates function in rasayel which saves you from typing a particular sentence repeatedly.
cons: What I don't like is the limitation of the templates. A user shouldn't need an approval from an administrator to create templates since the user knows the kind of messages he/she sends to the customers. Another dissatisfaction is the expiration of chats. We don't have reintroduce ourselves every 24 hours. Also I can only send pictures as pdf files And i can't even send two files at the same time so that makes two introductions.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Rasayel is a monumental CRM tools for customer services delivery.
description: Our overall experience with Rasayel has been very effective. It has assisted us to streamline our conversations with our customers which has allowed us to strengthen our relationship with them.
author: Alfred O.
pros: Rasayel really boosts our customers engagement on WhatsApp and makes our conversations quick and fast. It offers us with an incredible performance monitoring dashboard that provides us with insightful reports about our customers interactions. It is easy to customize and has helped us achieve a CRM tool that meets our needs perfectly allowing us to give our customers the most reliable support services.
cons: Using Rasayel has been very easy for us and its work rate has been efficient. There has been nothing to like least about it.

review_title: Rasayel is a modernistic trailblazer that convey quality and excellence in marketing.
description: It has been a splendid experience with Rasayel and everything has been working to our favor. Rasayel has become our source of happiness during marketing by making it easy for us to reach out new customers. It has brought us real excellence in marketing and customer engagement.
author: Sonia H.
pros: Rasayel chatbots has greatly spearheaded our conversations during marketing through automations. It has helped us communicate freely with customers at the most critical stage of closing deals. Rasayel also has robust marketing analytical tools which gives us insights to improve our marketing broadcasts. Rasayel team inbox makes it easy for our team to partner in engaging customers during marketing.
cons: Rasayel has shown us no flaws in any way and everything has been so diligent.

review_title: Rasayl for SaaS
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: I like the workflow and the support of they team
cons: No thing all is good for now with their team

review_title: An exceptional and defining tool for better sales experience.
description: It is a very intriguing experience getting to work on our sales operations with Rasayel. It is very user-friendly and has very productive leads engagement tools which help us succeed on our sales campaigns.
author: Abigail C.
pros: Everything about Rasayel workrate is soo good. The interface is impressively clean making it easy for us to use it for our sales. Its integration with HubSpot CRM allows us to have a simple experience working on our customers relationships. It has a high loading speed which makes our conversations with leads and customers very quick.
cons: All is well with Rasayel so far. Our journey with it has had no major blocks.

review_title: A reliable social selling platform that has greatly boosted our sales.
description: Rasayel has given a very reliable customer and lead engagement platform that has allowed us to streamline our sales operations on WhatsApp. It has provided us with an amazing bridge that connects us with our social customers and buyers.
author: Rhea S.
pros: It works directly with our WhatsApp so the learning curve was very simple and short. It allows me and my teammates to work on the same inbox when engaging customers during sales. Creating lead capture forms has been made easy. It was simple to setup our chatbot. Provides us with real-time metrics that helps us evaluate performance of our sales activities.
cons: Rasayel live agent has made our time very easy. We have been able to resolve all the challenges so nothing to hate now.

review_title: A firm and authentic tool with quality sales performance.
description: Rasayel has opened new doors to our social selling operations and has helped us increase our sales. It is very outstanding to use and in overall, the experience has been great.
author: Muresan I.
pros: Rasayel makes our leads engagements very smooth. The shared inbox allows us to coordinate our efforts when engaging customers. It was easy to setup and equip our chatbot with quick responses to the commonly asked questions. The sales and engagements reports keeps us on the know about our performance levels.
cons: The highly rated and easy to use Rasayel features has made our experience very smooth. Nothing negative to like least.

review_title: A must have tool for sales managers.
description: We are having a very suitable experience using Rasayel to work on our sales. It has given an incredible social selling space that helps turn our leads into customers.
author: Cristian F.
pros: It has a shared team inbox that helps us rally together as team when communicating with customers and potential leads. Excellent notifications which allows us to quickly respond to our customers messages. Provides us with an AI chatbot that assist us ensure our leads are getting answers instantly even we are not available.
cons: Thumbs up to Rasayel for not giving us any challenges at all. Genuinely nothing not to like about it.

review_title: Rasayel Saved My Inbox (and My Sanity)
author: Daniela B.
pros: Increased sales thanks to efficient communication. Overall, I’ve found the program to be comfortable and user-friendly. Despite my initial dislike for one update, they actively responded to user feedback and implemented positive changes.
cons: Rasayel has room for improvement in specific areas, for instance, the ability to merge chats or integrate more efficiently with other tools.

review_title: The best ahead if the rest
description: Perfect match of cost and quality is what describes Rasayel. Iam the one who passed the budget allocation for it's deployment which was quite reasonable considering all the benefits we are reaping through sales proceed on WhatsApp. Beyond being a sales channel it is an amazing CRM that helps in management and handling if clients enquiries. We have been able to create a community if clients where we broadcast and communicate on new developments.
author: Jackielyn G.
pros: Every aspect of Rasayel is topnotch. From the accelerated implementation process of it's sleek and glossy interface to an amazing user experience backed up by incredible and responsive customer support team. This platform is affordable and doesn't have any hidden charges compared to other tools and didn't have to acquire hardwares to run it because with the Whatsapp API we were able to access it. It encompasses fantastic functionalities that empowers our client engagements into a more personalized experience for easy followup and quick responses to prospects and clients enquiries . This has hastened lead closing. The sales reports generation is accurate and transparent to be able to track all sales executed on our socials which assist in reconciliation of income from sales on our reports
cons: Rasayel is the it. No hitches or downtimes.

review_title: Good review
description: Very good experience I would recommend for others
author: Israel B.
pros: The massaging functions, and multi chats
cons: No option for video chats, sometimes gets stuck

review_title: Rasayel is always there when we need it. Has greatly improved our sales.
description: Rasayel is allowing us to have one unified space for managing and tracking our sales through WhatsApp Business. Its work rate is incredible and has helped us close more deals on WhatsApp.
author: Neil D.
pros: Everything about Rasayel ease of use has been on point. The interface is lightweight and very user-friendly. The support is super good and we love it. Rasayel sales reports are very accurate and gives us transparency onto our sales operations on WhatsApp. The automations in Rasayel has been so valuable to us helping us offer quick-time responses to our prospects and improve on our sales success rate.
cons: We haven't had any issues with Rasayel so far. The support team has been greatly involved in our journey making our experience super efficient.

review_title: Rasayel is a great value for money and an easy to use chatbot system
description: Excellent, a fantastic onboarding experience and easy to use. a reasonable price point
author: Farzanah D.
pros: I found the team responsive, hands on and knowledgable. I also found them innovative and ready to listen and implement on new features.
cons: I wish the chatbot could be deployed for the facebook and insta DM portion. Currently it only works for the Whatsapp.

review_title: The best WhatsApp based CRM for sales, marketing and customer support
author: Shoaib A.
pros: Everything is very well made about Rasayel. It provides you a customer oriented platform on WhatsApp that gives a seamless experience to customer for their communication no matter they want it for sales or customer support, or how we communicate with them through our marketing campaigns. Other than that, I am more of a human experience therefore I won't say much about the chatbot but still chatbot is an advantage, but the best thing about it is reporting and analytics that can help you make decisions based on data.
cons: As an honest reviewer, everything is functional and well made that there is nothing to be disliked about it, everything is important than other.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Rasayel: the platform that made it possible to replace WhatsApp
author: Stefano D.
pros: In our company, we were able to improve communication with potential clients through the assignment of operators to each chat.
cons: I couldn't identify the sources of the leads, where they were coming from, whether they were from paid or organic campaigns.

review_title: A review from a CSM
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Its ease of use and accessibility on mobile phones.
cons: The templates feature and not being able to start a chat with free text.

review_title: Excellent Platform
author: Jonathan D.
pros: Its very easy to use, implement, and connect all our channels
cons: Nothing. Its a great platform for teams and communications

review_title: One Stop Chat Support
author: Jeevanantham M.
pros: Apart from the auto saved replies that saves you a lot of time. The A.I Integrated chat box which can fix your grammar, translate make sure you sound polite to the customers and Much more.
cons: I personally would always like to have my own themes on all of the platforms that i work. So, It would've been better to have an option to change the theme.

review_title: The Best Whatsapp Messsaging
description: Very joyful, it helped me out a lot and helped me message more then 5000+ customers
author: Muhammad B.
pros: Its very easy to use, its very usefull while using whatsapp marketing as its quite popular these days so its much easier for bulk messaging
cons: It sometimes sends wrong messages to the wrong customer but its like a 0.1% chance but still there
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Five - Six months of using Rasayel review
author: Abdullah A.
pros: It made managing costumers conversations much easier and controllable, the bot helps to address what kind of assistance the customer needs so the conversation would go automatically to the accountant team
cons: It is not possible to send multiple images at once, it has to be sent one by one. It is not possible to share a PDF file to a customer who are contacting through Instagram.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Rasayel is the most futuristic omnichannel communication tool that redefine customer support excellence
description: Rasayel's overall performance and value have exceeded our expectations. It has provided us with a WhatsApp-based team inbox that has supercharged collaboration among our team members by allowing us to quickly onboard team mates and manage our conversations. This has profoundly streamlined our internal communication and enabled us to efficiently handle our customer interactions. Its integration with Zoho CRM is a real powerhouse of managing customers engagements and effective lead generation. It enable us manage multiple properties, coordinate clients and allow for timely and relevant communication across all stakeholders.
author: Curtiss F.
pros: Rasayel's integration with WhatsApp is the real deal. It enable us to seamlessly interact with clients, making it easier to manage leads and sales over a popular messaging tool. The chatbox builder in Rasayel is easy to navigate and is intuitively designed making it easy to setup and customize our chatbots. Rasayel support robust integrations enable us to sync various systems and platforms to create custom solutions for our real estate projects that often involve multiple stakeholders and systems. Rasayel's reporting and analytics capabilities generate insights that aid in making data driven decisions on how to improve our customer service and use objective data to optimize our projects
cons: Managing multiple teams across multiple numbers is confusing and having a robust chat search function would help us know where messages are stored. Also the reporting tool should be more comprehensive to enable us to measure customer satisfaction levels effectively

review_title: Intuitiva e Fácil de Usar, mas com Poucos Dados de Progresso
description: "Minha experiência geral com Rasayel tem sido positiva. A plataforma é extremamente intuitiva e facilita muito a navegação e a configuração das ferramentas que preciso utilizar. Isso torna meu trabalho diário mais eficiente e agradável. No entanto, sinto que a falta de dados e métricas detalhadas para medir o progresso é uma área que precisa de melhoria. Se essa funcionalidade fosse aprimorada, acredito que a plataforma seria ainda mais útil e poderosa.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Gosto muito da plataforma pela intuição e facilidade de encontrar as configurações. É muito fácil de navegar e localizar o que preciso, o que torna a experiência de uso muito agradável.
cons: Não acho que tenha dados suficientes para medir o progresso. Sinto falta de mais informações e métricas que possam ajudar a avaliar melhor o desempenho e o progresso ao longo do tempo.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Positive review about rasayel experience
description: So far everything is convenient and useful
author: Esraa Q.
pros: I like that it's easy to use , has good amount of valuable features
cons: Moving in different chats is not the easiest
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
